text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As summer camp draws to a close, Smart Falcon
and I discuss our progress.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I powered up! ☆ I've gotten super strong, don't
you think?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be super competitive at the G1 level
now, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right! ☆ I'm feeling extra confident!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait, JBC Classic! I'll take you on right
now!
choice_data_list: There's still two more months, though!
There's still two more months, though!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An exciting summer camp comes to an end!
